notes.note: Cicero's villa near Cumae on the Bay of Naples, in the fashionable coastal belt where Marius too had a house; the neighbourhood that makes the two men neighbours and the Marius letters possible.

A wry personification: Cicero treats Marius's chronic gout (podagra) as a social caller with whom Marius keeps appointments, and begs him to reschedule the attack so they can meet while Cicero is in the area.
